identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
design_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation: Carnival Aesthetics x Modern App Usability
Content is King: The Coupon is the Hero
Zoom In: Big, bold typography and large touch targets
Negative Space: Use whitespace to separate loud colors

layout_strategies.card_style: rounded-2xl shadow-lg border-2 border-transparent hover:border-primary/20 transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold text-lg shadow-[0_4px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] active:shadow-none active:translate-y-[4px] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold shadow-md
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-semibold

inputs.default: rounded-xl border-2 border-input focus:border-primary focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all bg-background/50 h-12 px-4

cards.coupon: relative bg-white dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-2xl shadow-lg overflow-hidden border-2 border-dashed border-primary/30
cards.ride: rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-md hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 group

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-4 left-4 right-4 bg-background/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-border/50 rounded-full shadow-2xl flex justify-around items-center h-16 z-50
navigation.fab: fixed bottom-24 right-6 bg-primary text-primary-foreground p-4 rounded-full shadow-xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-40

libraries.maps: react-map-gl (if 3D maps needed) or simple Leaflet

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text on primary buttons is white (#FFFFFF) or very dark (#0F172A) depending on bg lightness.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have visible ring-2 ring-offset-2 on focus.
accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons (FABs) must have aria-label.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text legibility unless heavily contrasted.
Avoid 'Inter' font. Use 'Nunito' for body and 'Fredoka' for headings.
Buttons must feel 'clickable' with 3D shadow or scale effects.
Use skeleton loaders with 'shimmer' effect for data fetching.
Error states should be friendly (e.g., 'Whoops! No coupons here' vs '404 Not Found').
Every interaction needs a micro-animation (hover, tap, focus).
Client App: Light Mode Default (Sunshine/Fun). Organizer App: Dark Mode Default (Control/Focus).
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install fonts first. 2. Setup Tailwind colors. 3. Build 'CouponCard' and 'RideCard' components. 4. Implement 'Use Now' flow with confetti. 5. Create 'OrganizerDashboard' with bento grid. 6. Ensure mobile responsiveness is tested first.
